description:
Verify the 'Homogeneity of Regression Slopes' assumption for an ANCOVA predicting 'Exam' scores from 'Anxiety' (covariate) and 'Gender' (grouping factor) using the data in '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety.csv'. Perform a visual inspection using a scatterplot with regression lines and a formal statistical test for the interaction between the covariate and grouping factor. Save the Jamovi project to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/HomogeneityCheck.omv'. Create a report at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/assumption_report.txt' containing the unstandardized coefficient (B) and p-value for the interaction term, and your conclusion (Assumption Met/Violated), using this exact format:
Interaction_B=<value>
Interaction_p=<value>
Conclusion=<Met or Violated>
